secretaryOfState.agency: Minnesota Secretary of State Business Services

hours.regular: Office staffed Monday-Friday 8:00 a.m.-4:00 p.m.; phone lines Monday-Friday 9:00 a.m.-4:00 p.m.

physicalAddresses.label: Minnesota Secretary of State Business Services
physicalAddresses.street: First National Bank Building, 332 Minnesota Street, Suite N201

mailingAddress.street: First National Bank Building, 332 Minnesota Street, Suite N201

renewals.notes: Minnesota LLC annual renewal must be filed by December 31; domestic and foreign LLC annual renewal filing fee is $0 when active and in good standing (official fee schedule and renewal form).

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic LLC Articles of Organization (Ch. 322C) $155 in-person/online; $135 by mail (Business Filing Fee Schedule).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Name Reservation original filing $55 in-person/online and $35 by mail; reservation valid for twelve months.
